room.name: a road leading towards the Prole Quarters.
room.description: The long road narrows as you leave the Party-controlled district. Potholes scar the cobbles, and the buildings lean like crooked teeth. Laundry lines sway above, and voices rise in drunken argument. A painted slogan is half-scrubbed from a wall: "Ignorance is Strength".

room.name: a junction between tenements.
room.description: The walls close in, stacked with crooked balconies and broken shutters. The smell of garbage and frying oil drifts through the air. Prole children scatter at the sight of you. Your overalls mark you out plainly as a party member.

room.name: outside a crumbling tenement house.
room.description: The house is derelict and uninviting. The door hangs ajar and all the windows are broken. Inside is dark and foreboding. A maze of passageways lead off in all directions from the road outside.

room.name: inside a crumbling tenement house.
room.description: A stairwell looks upward into darkness but there are no stairs, The pile of rotten timber on the mouldering lino at the bottom of the shaft clearly shows what has happened. The plaster is cracked and broken furniture lies is trewn around the room. In the rubble, something glints faintly.

room.name: a dark tenement alley.
room.description: Narrow cobblestones and overflowing rubbish bins. Clothes hang on lines above, swaying in the faint wind. Rats scuttle in the shadows.

room.name: a courtyard between crumbling tenements.
room.description: Broken windows peer down onto a paved courtyard. Old barrels and discarded furniture form a labyrinth of hiding spots. Faint voices echo from upstairs.

room.name: a tiny passage between tenements.
room.description: A barely noticeable passage between two tenements. The walls are plastered with faded posters and the smell of damp lingers. Behind a closed door in the wall at the end of the alley you can hear faint voices bargaining.

room.name: a back street near the tenement roofs.
room.description: Fire escapes zigzag up the walls. An old advert for Ind Coope breweries is painted on the back wall of a larger building. A few children toss stones into empty barrels, then scatter at your approach. The smell of soot and boiling hops compete.

room.name: inside a half-collapsed tenement.
room.description: The roof sags dangerously, and sunlight filters through cracks in the walls. You spot remnants of old furniture and torn wallpaper.

room.name: a narrow alley with overflowing garbage.
room.description: Stinking piles of refuse almost block the passage. You hear footsteps above, someone moving quickly across a roof. The row of buildings in front of you looks fairly well maintained and could well be occupied.

room.name: inside a two up two down.
room.description: The living room contains a baattered looking table and a few chairs. Some shelving shows rows of old style book novels. There's a gameboard on the floor, words spelt out in tiles on the board show a decent level of eduation by the occupants. A door leads through to a kitchen at the back and there's a stairwell leading up to the top floor.

room.name: the kitchen of a two up two down.
room.description: A basic kitchen with sink, a freestanding oven and a cupboard on the wall over a scrubbed work surface.

room.name: the entrance to another tenement.
room.description: A rusty door hang crookedly on its hinges and faint sounds of dripping water echoes come from a damp basement below. It smells damp and sour.

room.name: a crumbling stairwell.
room.description: Stairs twist upward, their edges worn and cracked. The walls are streaked with grime and the occasional graffiti mark.

room.name: a rooftop overlook.
room.description: From here you can see the broken skyline of the Prole district. Smoke rises from chimneys and the distant market bustles faintly below.

room.name: an abandoned two up two down.
room.description: The thin plastered wall leading to the kitchen has collapsed or been half knocked down leaving one large rubble strewn room. The remains of a kitchen are visble at the back and some broken furniture. A rickety staircase leads up to a room above.

room.name: upstairs in an abandoned two up two down.
room.description: A similar story to downstairs, whatever dividing walls used to be there have fallen or been knocked down leaving one large room. Broken roof tiles litter the damp floor. The wooden floorboards are rotten and probably dangerous to tread on. A rusty bedframe and a moth-eaten mattress remain in one end, a high backed armchair over to ne side with a small table next to it. A rickety staircase leads down to the room below.

room.name: a bustling Prole Market.
room.description: Ramshackle stalls line the street, selling grey bread, greasy sausages, and bottles of harsh gin. The air buzzes with barter and haggling. A man eyes you suspiciously from behind a stack of cabbages. The route further East is blocked by the rubble from a bombed out row of houses.

room.name: a hidden courtyard behind the market.
room.description: The noise of the stalls fades here. A few men in patched coats gather around crates under a tarp.

room.name: the Black Market.
room.description: A small square is filled with makeshift stalls and crates. Barter takes place quietly - goods change hands with knowing glances.

room.name: the entrance to a workshop.
room.description: A steel door leads in to a prefabricated structure. Boxes of equipment are stacked against the walls to your left and right.

room.name: the electronics workshop.
room.description: Several benches are laid out with tools, a crude oscilloscope and various components, shelves piled high with liberated parts. There air is thick with the smell of solder and chemicals. Several telescreens are mounted on the benches, some have boards already attached, their displays are showing .

room.name: outside the Victory Arms Pub.
room.description: A sagging signboard shows a painted fist gripping an old-fashioned dimpled pint mug. The pub leans against the end of the remains of row of bombed out houses. Rubble completely blocking the route West. Drunken laughter spills out through broken shutters, mixing with the smell of gin and boiled cabbage.

room.name: inside the Victory Arms.
room.description: The room is dark and smoky, filled with the stink of sweat and gin. Men gamble with dice on an overturned barrel. A telescreen crackles faintly behind the bar, mostly ignored.

room.name: inside a Prole Launderette.
room.description: Steam fills the air, mingling with the sour reek of soap and damp clothing. Old washing drums clatter and whine, tended by weary women gossiping in low voices. A cracked glass door on a cupboard hangs ajar near the back wall. Something glints faintly inside.

room.name: outside a Party-run Infirmary.
room.description: Looming large and foreboding to the North. Helicopters buzz around keeping watch. Nobody goes in or out without leave.

room.name: the Airstrip One North Party-run Infirmary.
room.description: Whitewashed walls stained with smoke and mildew. Rows of iron beds line the room, mostly empty but some occupied by moaning Party members who pay their dues. A nurse in a stiff grey uniform moves briskly watched by a telescreen that drones about Party generosity. A faint smell of disinfectant barely covers blood and decay.
